steps.t: Nearby is another slain body. You should investigate the slain Sûhalar.
There is a bear trap on the slain body. You should examine the bear trap.
The Sûhalar slayer must be nearby. You should search nearby for more signs of conflict.
There are footprints around the slain body. You should examine foot prints.
You should run after Tolwin so that you may speak with him.
